summary.description: A concise summary of completed work, or why work did not proceed.

comment.description: A GitHub issue comment to post for clarification or blocked outcomes. Use an empty string when completed.

tests.description: Verification commands run and their result. Mention commands that could not be run.

risk.description: Residual risk or review notes for the pull request.

pr_title.description: Draft pull request title to use when outcome is completed.
